pred_reason: SWC-101 applies due to identified integer underflow in shogunateQuantity mappings when subtracting counts. SWC-107 applies because multiple functions violate the Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern by making external calls before state updates. Evidence: shogunateQuantity mapping subtraction vulnerable to underflow (Task 8); mintSamurai and giveawayMintSamurai call _safeMint before state updates (Task 2, Task 3); No reentrancy guards present despite external calls in state-changing functions (Task 4)

raw.pred_reason: SWC-101 applies due to identified integer underflow in shogunateQuantity mappings when subtracting counts. SWC-107 applies because multiple functions violate the Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern by making external calls before state updates. Evidence: shogunateQuantity mapping subtraction vulnerable to underflow (Task 8); mintSamurai and giveawayMintSamurai call _safeMint before state updates (Task 2, Task 3); No reentrancy guards present despite external calls in state-changing functions (Task 4)

llm_explanation.reason: SWC-101 applies due to identified integer underflow in shogunateQuantity mappings when subtracting counts. SWC-107 applies because multiple functions violate the Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern by making external calls before state updates.
evidence: shogunateQuantity mapping subtraction vulnerable to underflow (Task 8)
mintSamurai and giveawayMintSamurai call _safeMint before state updates (Task 2, Task 3)
No reentrancy guards present despite external calls in state-changing functions (Task 4)
